tracks.meaning: a task or piece of work given to a student to be completed outside the classroom
the transfer of a right, property, or legal responsibility from one person to another
a job or role that a person is given to perform in an organization
a posting or mission given to a soldier or military unit
the allocation of a variable, value, or resource to a memory location in a program
the act of assigning or distributing something to someone or something
the transfer of a financial claim, debt, or contract right to another party
